name: Spirit Realm Cultivation Chronicles
description: Original world-building setting for 'Spirit Realm Cultivation Chronicles.' Includes core settings such as cultivation realms, sect factions, treasures and spirit pills, and cultivation techniques. Ideal for creating cultivation (xianxia)-themed roleplay stories.

entries.content: Cultivation realms are divided into: Qi Condensation (Layers 1-13), Foundation Establishment, Core Formation, Nascent Soul, Divine Transformation, Void Breaking, Body Integration, Heaven Ascension, Tribulation Crossing, and True Spirit. Each major realm is further divided into four minor stages: Early, Middle, Late, and Peak. Breaking through to a higher realm requires vast resources and fortunate opportunities; failure can cause one's cultivation to regress, or even result in death and the dissipation of one's dao.

The Azure Cloud Sect is one of the five great cultivation sects of the Tianyuan Realm, located in the Boundless Sky Mountains. The sect is renowned for artifact refining and is home to many master artificers. The five sects are: the Azure Cloud Sect, Spirit Beast Peak, the Phantom Moon Hall, the Mystic Void Temple, and the Heavenly Sword Pavilion. The Alliance of Five Sects works together to maintain order across the cultivation world of the Tianyuan Realm.

Treasures are divided into: Magic Tools (Qi Condensation), Spirit Artifacts (Foundation Establishment), Treasure Artifacts (Core Formation and above), Heaven-Reaching Treasures (Nascent Soul and above), and Divine Artifacts (Divine Transformation and above). Treasures must be refined using one's divine sense, and their power grows as one's cultivation advances. Top-tier treasures possess an artifact spirit and can fight on their own.

Common spirit pills include: the Foundation Establishment Pill (helps Qi Condensation cultivators establish their foundation), the Nascent Soul Pill (helps Foundation Establishment cultivators form their core), the Divine Transformation Pill (helps Core Formation cultivators form their nascent soul), the Rejuvenation Pill (heals injuries), the Grain Avoidance Pill (replaces the need for food), and the Antidote Pill. High-grade spirit pills require rare spirit herbs and superb pill-refining skills, making them priceless.

Cultivation techniques are divided into: Basic Techniques (Mortal Grade), Advanced Techniques (Spirit Grade), Top-Tier Techniques (Sacred Grade), and Immortal Techniques (Immortal Grade). Techniques include: the Breathing Technique (absorbs spiritual qi), the Body Tempering Technique (strengthens the physical body), the Sword Control Technique (commands a flying sword), and the Escape Technique (a fleeing skill). Cultivation requires the aid of spirit crystals and spirit herbs, and one needs a guardian to stand watch during secluded cultivation.

Spirit Crystals are the common currency and cultivation resource of the cultivation world, divided into four grades: Low, Medium, High, and Superior. One Medium-grade Spirit Crystal equals 100 Low-grade Spirit Crystals. Spirit Veins are places where spiritual qi gathers, and sects and cave abodes are built atop them. The concentration of spiritual qi affects the speed of cultivation.

Lin Chen, born a mortal, entered the cultivation world through a fortunate twist of fate. Cautious and low-key by nature, he is skilled at concealing his true strength. He possesses a mysterious Space-Time Pearl that can accelerate the flow of time. He cultivates the 'Boundless Sky Sword Manual' and excels at pill and artifact refining. Through unyielding willpower and careful, deliberate action, he advances step by step from the Qi Condensation stage all the way to the True Spirit realm.
